channel.title: 努力的咸鱼
channel.description: Recent content on 努力的咸鱼

item.title: cousera_machine_learning_week3
item.description: addClassKlippyTo("pre.r, pre.markdown"); addKlippy('left', 'top', 'auto', '1', 'Copy code', 'Copied!'); 这是机器学习课程笔记的第三篇，内容包括：分类问题、逻辑回归（假设函数、损失函数）、梯度下降法求解\(\theta\)、决策

item.title: The FASTA program package
item.description: addClassKlippyTo("pre.r, pre.markdown"); addKlippy('left', 'top', 'auto', '1', 'Copy code', 'Copied!'); FASTA与BLAST类似，能够进行序列比对，内含多种比对算法，能够获得大量定量结果，帮助我们推断同源性。 安装 进入Late

item.title: 读书|专念（一）
item.description: 这是该读书笔记的第二篇，希望自己能够坚持下去~ 该书的原版书名为Mindfulness，翻译为“专念”的确有些奇怪。词典释义为正念，专注，仔细

item.title: Shape and color
item.description: Visual Contrast shape contrast: simple, complex, large(/simple), Vertical(Horizontal), narrow(broad). shallow(deep), moving(static), light(dark), soft(hard), light(heavy), volume. Marks, Icons and Symbols Icon(pictorial represents actual things, easy to read), Symbol. Figure/Ground Figure, Ground(Background), think about them perspectively. Negative/Positive, create depth. Both scale and tonality can affect the depth. Color color indicates emotional response. color: HUE, rainbow, value(light to dark), saturation(dull to intense). color wheel: analogous colors complementary colors(rotatae \(180^0\)) Color tints color palette

item.title: 读书|最好的告别
item.description: 阅读使人获得更加丰富的生命体验，这也是我最忠诚的心灵伴侣。今后我将不定期更新读书笔记。这是该系列的第一篇。希望今后能坚持下去~ 这是我第二次读

item.title: 成长|成瘾
item.description: 我常常感到自己随着年纪的增长，专注力有所下降，随之而来的是自制力与自我调节的能力也大不如从前。无数次痛下决心，希望自己能够戒掉电子产品并抵御

item.title: 成长|如何进步
item.description: 最近特别关注个人的成长问题。心中一直积蓄着什么能量，总想着做点什么。受到学弟公众号的启发，我意识到生活中其实有很多思考都值得记录下来。我会坚

item.title: cousera-machine_learning_week2
item.description: addClassKlippyTo("pre.r, pre.markdown"); addKlippy('left', 'top', 'auto', '1', 'Copy code', 'Copied!'); 这是该系列笔记的第二篇。包含：多变量线性回归、feature scaling & mean normalization、Normal equation

item.title: 疫情迷思
item.description: 疫情之下的学校显得有些特别。每天不停地面部识别，测量体温。人与人之间的关系也变得微妙起来。但令我惊喜的是，即使人人都戴着口罩，同学之间仍能够

item.title: 如何读文献
item.description: 今天在@返朴公众号上看到一篇讲述如何阅读文献的文章，来自于哈尔滨医科大学（深圳）的王威教授。颇觉收益，它讲述了读文献的原因与方法。但我认为还

item.title: cousera_machinelearning_week1
item.description: 我在cousera上学习了斯坦福大学吴恩达的《机器学习》，每周将记录当周的学习总结笔记，这是该系列笔记的第一篇，希望能够继续坚持下去。 Definition & type

item.title: Efficient R Programming
item.description: addClassKlippyTo("pre.r, pre.markdown"); addKlippy('left', 'top', 'auto', '1', 'Copy code', 'Copied!'); Here are some tips and thoughts while reading the book(Efficient R programming). Introduction library("microbenchmark") library("profvis") library("ggplot2") touch typing & work consistently. it’s better to use packagename::function if you only use a package’s function once. benchmark & profiling. microbenchmark(), compare different function working speed. profilling: testing large chunks of code. installr::updateR() install and loading several packages: pkgs = c("raster", "leaflet", "rgeos") # package names install.

item.title: R programming(Roger D.peng)
item.description: Here are some tips when I am reading the R programming written by Roger D.peng. Function A variable number of arguments can be specified using the special … argument in a function definition, is often used when extending another function and you don’t want to copy the entire argument list of the original function Functions always return the last expression evaluated in the function body.Note that there is a return() function that can be used to return an explicity value from a function, but it is rarely used in R.

item.title: reading from connection
item.description: file arguments: r, w, a ,rb, wb, ab > ## Create a connection to 'foo.txt' > con <- file("foo.txt") > > ## Open connection to 'foo.txt' in read-only mode > open(con, "r") > > ## Read from the connection > data <- read.csv(con) > > ## Close the connection > close(con) gzfile: readLines > ## Open connection to gz-compressed text file > con <- gzfile("words.gz") > x <- readLines(con, 10) > x [1] "1080" "10-point" "10th" "11-point" "12-point" "16-point" [7] "18-point" "1st" "2" "20-point" URL con <- url("http://www.

item.title: reading large data frame
item.description: 建议 如果已知行数和列数，以及数据类型，可大致估计读取该对象需要占用的内存，以免出现内存不够用的情况。(当然同时还要考虑其他程序的占用情况) 1,500,000

item.title: About me
item.description: Skill Language: Chineses, English Programming: R, Latex Hobby: painting, writing, reading Goal Write a popular science book about my work. Master Japanese as my third language. Travel to Gootingen, German, Ghibli Museum, Japan. Be proficient in R. Learn painting comic books, possibly scientific comics. Give a research talk at an international conference.

item.title: Rmd学习笔记
item.description: Basics R markdown 由三部分组成：metadata（也被称为YAML metadata,注意缩进）, text, code({r}或者r(incline code)。一些

item.title: Typography
item.description: The lexicon system The anatomy of letters letter anatomy terminology: terminal, bowl, stem, bowl, counterspace, spur. Words and spacing cap-height(T height), baseline(P) x-height.descender,ascender tracking = letter spacing + word spacing. Type size: the point system 金属印刷，72 points per inch, can only choose fixed size points. 120,96,72,48—Headli

item.title: 测试
item.description: 测试中文，test chinese

item.title: 再读《自由人生》
item.description: 读好书令人精神振奋，即使是悲剧都不会使人颓唐，它使人学会自省，反思自己的精神生活；而与之相反，读一本坏书或坏文章，将给人带来负面情绪，使人无

item.title: Hello R Markdown
item.description: R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.
